betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The World Soul of the Meatball Flesh.
The origin of Earth's devastation.
The greatest weapon of the Meatball Man.
And yet another trap.
Powerful Meatball Fiends, they were waiting for me. Their information on me is accurate, too accurate...
Annihilating every creature on the planet, it may be the only way to make it to the Meatball Man.
And that too, I suspect, was forseen by the meatball man. Make me go through the entirety of his horde, let me show how worthy of an opponent I am. Adding drama to a face-off where he holds all the cards.
And yet, my only way is forward. I cannot retire. I cannot stop.
I owe it to the fallen. They must be vindicated, and a strategic win is not enough.
No the entirety of the Hungering scurge must be removed. Completely.
